heroSection.title: Lily Bloom Bakery Showcase
heroSection.subTitle: Full-Stack Showcase Website
heroSection.description: A beautiful, multilingual online showcase + admin dashboard built and deployed for a local Brooklyn bakery.

mainContent.overview: Developed and launched a complete full-stack showcase website for a local bakery. The platform features server-side rendering, multilingual support (English & Simplified Chinese), a full admin dashboard, and an automated bulk import pipeline.

keyFeature.body: Next.js 15 App Router with full English / Simplified Chinese support
Secure backend dashboard for menu, orders, and content management
CSV / XLSX + image ZIP upload → automatic extraction → S3 staging
Elastic Beanstalk, Amplify, CloudFront, and S3 for fast global delivery
